## Description

A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Step one
2. Step two
3. ...

## Expected Behavior

What should happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happens. Include error messages or screenshots if applicable.

## Environment

- **Runtime version:** (e.g. Node 20, Python 3.12)
- **OS:** (e.g. macOS 15, Ubuntu 24.04, Windows 11)
- **Browser:** (if applicable)
- **Package version:** (e.g. 1.4.2)
